title: Redwood
description: Redwood is a mod that features redwood wood sets, redwood biomes, and a new dimension to the game.
body: ## Redwood **Redwood is a Mod that adds more wood types and trees to your game** ![Redwood Sign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/036d2d245cb9fbfe75899577d106a334255ceca2.png) ![Redwood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62adb509725dfb0f9ec8aab1cc5f0a145efbeee8.png) ![Redwood Boat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a865554872f902ed1e241b6431550c63bd9ec551.png) ![More Redwood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/960a2947057c3877cf2dd4eb3f152c1eef67329b.png) Redwood also adds a Redwood Biome as well as a new dimensinon called the resource realm which is a peaceful dimension with taigas and redwood biomes ![Resource Realm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d330186667d8bf693dc44cf1f8c44d6b74889f4e.png) ## Enjoy!
